title: tilia caroliniana var. lata
intro: Tilia caroliniana var. lata, also known as the southern white basswood, is a deciduous tree native to the southeastern United States and a variety of the American basswood tree. The bark and leaves of this plant have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Tilia caroliniana var. lata include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting sleep, and calming the nervous system. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, often in combination with other herbs, to create relaxing and calming remedies.
